## This is a minimal waybar for omarchy.
![Uploading image.png…]()
https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/230438592/537238157-faecaa18-018e-45af-bf63-14bd5bac8218.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzI5Mjg2MDcsIm5iZiI6MTc3MjkyODMwNywicGF0aCI6Ii8yMzA0Mzg1OTIvNTM3MjM4MTU3LWZhZWNhYTE4LTAxOGUtNDVhZi1iZjYzLTE0YmQ1YmFjODIxOC5wbmc_.URWKrKwTmgpI3rbrBXy663QrdrZ3jQ7tbpFxFTA3KmU


### To Downlowd it:
```
git clone https://github.com/HANCORE-linux/waybar-themes.git /tmp/repo && cp -rf /tmp/repo/config/V1.1/. ~/.config/waybar && rm -rf /tmp/repo && omarchy-restart-waybar
```

### Resourses:
https://github.com/HANCORE-linux/waybar-themes
